item.title: Walking 40 ft with ankle weights today.
item.description: Walking with ankle weights and turning the corner without having to stop and keeping my balance. I hope everyone is doing well and having a great day. It has been a while and I wanted give an update.

item.title: ICM QUALITY MIX - Vol.31 LATE NIGHT FEELINGS
item.description:
COVER ARTIST: Yuanbin Hu Leblanc
ICM SUGGESTED TRACK: [ ▶ & SCROLL] Late Night Feelings - Mark Ronson feat. Lykke Li YouTube: https://youtu.be/OpNJTr7q1LM?si=drxkbsGt3ooba3Sw Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/track/7aQeWViSfRWSEwtJD86Eq0?si=b59e83bb70b84eb8
Moon Colony
Alex Alenseenko
Luye Liang Shanzhong
Wenjun Lin
Filipe Pagliuso
Emilyena Strange
Sergey Chernigin
Ismail Inceoglu
Inhyuk Lee
Joao Marcello
Emilyena Strange
Veronika Kozlova
Mam Ba
TONTON REVOLVER
Robin Li
Jun Kim
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: The Void
item.description: Getting the feeling that our strip collections are somewhat of a crisis indicator. First book came out in the same week as the first lockdown. Second book when Trump decided to trash the American economy ? Get it before the tariffs hit ? https://bookshop.org/p/books/hi-earth-elizabeth-pich/21567543

item.title: Asking the BIG Questions! [OC]
item.description:
Previously unreleased BONUS COMIC below!
Shoutout for Hubby's show! We're looking to turn his comic into a cartoon too! More info at https://www.kickstarter.com/projects/ghosthause/greetings-from-grisley-the-animated-series
BONUS Comic! I wish I could claim Fran's lines, but they were actually our pal Zach from Last Place Comics https://www.instagram.com/last_place_comics/ when J was relaying the conversation he had with out youngest in a group chat! Thanks to my patrons for making these bonuses possible! https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: No Kings.
item.description:
Hey there. I'm just a guy who loves my country that's terrified about it's current direction and completely underwhelmed by the apathy I see in my fellow citizens.
If we the people don't find some fire in our hearts and spines we are going to guarantee a conflict. I am doing everything in my power to be a speed bump to autocracy and I'm hoping a video like this will inspire other to have hard conversations with our friends and family that have decided to ignore the suffering of others and the degradation of our freedoms. Americans we need to act. Thanks for reading. I hope something good happens for you. Stay safe and sane in these turbulent times.
item.dc:creator: sinestroxlodx

item.title: The Trump admin is arresting and pushing out legal immigrants for the high crime of criticizing Israel.
item.description:
If there's anything in Congress for Cory Booker to do a protest speech for, it's this. But he votes in favor of Israel just the same as any Republican.
Ta-Nehisi Coates did a talk in University of Michigan in February where he made a really good point regarding opposition to Trump. There isn't one, and the canary in the coal mine was the general Democrat's response to the genocide in Gaza.
Malcolm X called it out a long time ago too. The genocide in Palestine is a moral priority for it has immediate consequences in your daily life whether you're able to see it or not.
item.dc:creator: WarmMachineDD7

item.dc:creator: zoraniko

item.title: PSA: we are being infiltrated and disrupted. If you encounter accounts like this, be aware they're deliberately wasting your time.
item.description:
Notice this "Nick" account, who is just trying to create disruption. It's doing the same thing for the Left that Fox News does for the United States: divide and weaken.
It doesn't care about the truth, it's not here to help or contribute. It's just disrupting. And that's the whole angle.
I hope this is clear. I find Bluesky threads a little muddled, and had to futz around with the screenshots to get the whole thread posted here. If I've succeeded, you get the idea that "people" like this aren't worthwhile. Support Harris? You supported genocide. Blame the Republicans who sabotaged the election? Not good enough. Talking to "people" like this, even if they are real people, isn't worthwhile. They're probably here just to create divisiveness. Good luck out there. Big protest on the 5th (near you!). Stop buying from companies supporting the fascist takeover, and yes, it is a fascist takeover; they're following the playbook. Resist while we can so we don't lose the ability to do so.
item.dc:creator: zafner
